eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Big Stone, MN; at 9:21 AM on AUG 14, 2019 Effective until 10:21 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Kandiyohi County Emergency Management TEST ONLY for Big Stone County.  For questions call 320-231-6520
